name: quote
label: Quote
help_text: The testimonial quote. No need to add quotation marks — they're added automatically by the quote icon.
default: GrowthArchitect didn't just give us a marketing plan; they built a scalable infrastructure that allowed us to triple our revenue in under 18 months. Their technical expertise in HubSpot is second to none.

name: author_name
label: Author Name
help_text: Full name of the person quoted

name: author_role
label: Author Role
help_text: Job title and company of the person quoted

name: author_image
label: Author Image
help_text: Square headshot photo (160x160px minimum). Displayed as a circle.

children.name: heading
children.label: Heading
children.help_text: Optional heading displayed above the testimonial

children.name: heading_type
children.label: Heading Level
children.help_text: HTML heading level for SEO and accessibility

children.name: subheading
children.label: Subheading
children.help_text: Optional subheading displayed below the heading

name: scrollid
label: Scroll ID
help_text: Optional anchor ID for in-page navigation links

children.name: padding_top
children.label: Top Spacing
children.help_text: Top spacing in pixels for mobile devices
